title: MBTA Transit Equity & Civic Improvement Dashboard
description: A multilingual, AI-powered civic tool that exposes transit inequity in Boston using live MBTA data. Features ghost bus detection, wait time Pain Index, RAG-based policy fact-checking, a conversational transit agent (Ask the T), equity scorecards with Census demographics, and an auto-generated open letter to the MBTA Board. Supports 7 languages including Haitian Creole and Arabic. Built with Claude API, LangGraph, MCP, RAG, plotly, and marimo.
author: manisha002307735
